meta.notice_title: B.E. / B. Tech. (4 Years) & Integrated M.E. / M. Tech. (5 Years) Admission 2026-27
meta.source: CET Cell Mumbai, Notice No. TED 1226/C.R.07/CAP/BE/Admission Notice No: 1/2026/1582, dated July 2, 2026
meta.disclaimer: All dates are provisional. Please verify on www.mahacet.org. Schedules may change.

schedule.activity: Document Verification & Application Confirmation (E-Scrutiny / Physical Scrutiny)
Submission of Grievances (for corrections in provisional merit list)
Option Form, CAP Allotment & Reporting Schedule

documents_required.name: CET / JEE Marksheet 2026
documents_required.note: MHT-CET or JEE Main or NEET scorecard as applicable.

documents_required.name: HSC College Leaving Certificate
documents_required.note: Transfer / Leaving certificate from last institution.

documents_required.name: Nationality Certificate
documents_required.note: Required only if Indian nationality is not mentioned in Leaving Certificate.

documents_required.name: Provisional Eligibility Certificate
documents_required.note: Mandatory for OMS candidates and Diploma holders.

documents_required.name: Gap Certificate
documents_required.note: If there is a gap in education after 10+2.

documents_required.name: Caste Validity Certificate
documents_required.note: SC/ST need Tribe Validity; others need Caste Validity.

documents_required.name: Migration Certificate
documents_required.note: For OMS candidates from other boards/universities.

documents_required.name: Declaration Affidavit for Minority
documents_required.note: If religion not mentioned in Leaving Certificate.

eligibility.general: Candidate must be an Indian citizen and have passed 10+2 (or equivalent) from a recognised board.

maharashtra_pcm.title: Standard PCM (for all 29 major engineering disciplines)
maharashtra_pcm.subjects: Physics + Mathematics + one of Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Technical Vocational / CS / IT / Informatics Practices / Agriculture / Engineering Graphics / Business Studies / Electronics / Entrepreneurship.
maharashtra_pcm.min_marks: 45% (40% for reserved/EWS/PWD Maharashtra State candidates) in PCM group.
maharashtra_pcm.entrance: Must have appeared in MHT-CET 2026 (PCM) and obtained non-zero score. JEE Main 2026 non-zero positive score preferred.

maharashtra_pcb.title: For specific disciplines (Agriculture, Biotech, Food, etc.)
maharashtra_pcb.subjects: Physics + Chemistry + one of Mathematics / Biology / etc.
maharashtra_pcb.entrance: Appeared in MHT-CET 2026 (PCM/PCB/PCMB) with non-zero score, OR non-zero positive score in JEE Main 2026, OR non-zero positive score in NEET-UG 2026.

eligibility.diploma_lateral: Passed 3-year Diploma in Engineering with 45% (40% for reserved) OR 3-year D.Voc. in same/allied sector.
eligibility.all_india_oms: Same academic eligibility as Maharashtra candidates. Must have valid JEE Main or MHT-CET score. No reserved category relaxation for OMS candidates.
eligibility.nri_oci_pio: Refer to https://fn.mahacet.org/ for dedicated admission process.
eligibility.jk_ladakh_migrants: Register online and get application confirmed at SPCE, Mumbai. Approach institutes directly for quota seats.
eligibility.orphan_transgender: Reservation / fee concessions as per Government Resolutions.
eligibility.defence: As per Ministry of Defence guidelines dated 21 May 2018.

registration_fee.mode: Online only (Credit/Debit Card, NetBanking, UPI). Non-refundable.

verification_modes.e_scrutiny: Fully online. Upload documents, get verified remotely. If errors, re-upload. No visit required.
verification_modes.physical_scrutiny: Visit selected Facilitation Centre with originals + photocopies. Verification done on the spot.

important_instructions: Keep your registered mobile number active - all OTPs and updates are sent to it.
Make at least 7 sets of document photocopies and keep 5 passport-size photos ready.
Reserved category candidates must produce all original certificates (caste, validity, non-creamy layer). Without them, they will be treated as General category.

If you submitted a receipt for validity/NCL/EWS certificate, you must upload the original and submit it to the admitted institute before the final reporting date of the fourth CAP round, or admission will be cancelled.
Physical scrutiny candidates must visit the Facilitation Centre in person for grievance resolution.
Read the schedule carefully and complete each step within deadlines. Late applications will be rejected.
